Faculty

Co-Director, Faculty

Faculty

Cryptographic protocols, distributed systems theory

Faculty

Distributed systems, encrypted databases

Co-Director, Faculty

Privacy-preserving computation, verifiable computation, blockchains

Faculty

Faculty
